nasb.text: Next the standard of the camp of Reuben, according to their armies, set out with Elizur the son of Shedeur, over its army,

esv.text: And the standard of the camp of Reuben set out by their companies, and over their company was Elizur the son of Shedeur.

cnv.text: 流本營的旗號，按著他們的隊伍起行；統領隊伍的，是示丟珥的兒子以利蓿。

ccb.text: 随后出发的是吕便旗下的营队，率领吕便支派的是示丢珥的儿子以利苏，
